languages.text: {n}Эоганн хмурится, задумчиво теребя пистон на бороде.{/n} "Вы разделяете понятия "жизни" и "выживания"? Но где проходит эта грань? Разве что-то может перевешивать желание жить любой ценой? Признаться, я не рассматривал вопрос с подобной точки зрения, но ваша сила воли восхищает меня. Быть может, стоит проявить силу духа и мне, взглянув на гипотезу с иного ракурса".

{n}Eogunn frowns, pensively tugging at a piston on his beard.{/n} "You differentiate between the concepts of 'life' and 'survival'? But where do you draw the line? Can anything outweigh the desire to live at all costs? I admit, I have not considered the question from such a perspective, but your strength of will impresses me. Perhaps I should show some fortitude as well, and consider my hypothesis from a different angle."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн хмурится, задумчиво теребя пистон на бороде.{/n} "Вы разделяете понятия "жизни" и "выживания"? Но где проходит эта грань? Разве что-то может перевешивать желание жить любой ценой? Признаться, я не рассматривал вопрос с подобной точки зрения, но ваша сила воли восхищает меня. Быть может, стоит проявить силу духа и мне, взглянув на гипотезу с иного ракурса".

Perhaps I should show some fortitude as well, and consider my hypothesis from a different angle."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn runzelt die Stirn und spielt gedankenverloren mit einem Kolben an seinem Bart.{/n} "Ihr differenziert zwischen den Konzepten 'Leben' und 'Überleben'? Aber wo zieht Ihr die Grenze? Kann etwas den Wunsch, um jeden Preis zu leben, überwiegen? Ich gebe zu, aus dieser Perspektive habe ich die Frage noch nicht betrachtet, aber Euer Willensstärke beeindruckt mich. Vielleicht sollte ich auch ein wenig Mut an den Tag legen und meine Hypothese aus einem anderen Blickwinkel betrachten."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn frowns, pensively tugging at a piston on his beard.{/n} "You differentiate between the concepts of 'life' and 'survival'? But where do you draw the line? Can anything outweigh the desire to live at all costs? I admit, I have not considered the question from such a perspective, but your strength of will impresses me. Perhaps I should show some fortitude as well, and consider my hypothesis from a different angle."

Aber wo zieht Ihr die Grenze? Kann etwas den Wunsch, um jeden Preis zu leben, überwiegen? Ich gebe zu, aus dieser Perspektive habe ich die Frage noch nicht betrachtet, aber Euer Willensstärke beeindruckt mich. Vielleicht sollte ich auch ein wenig Mut an den Tag legen und meine Hypothese aus einem anderen Blickwinkel betrachten."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn fronce les sourcils et triture pensivement l'un des pistons de sa barbe.{/n} « Vous considérez donc que les concepts de vie et de survie sont différents ? Mais où est la limite ? Est-il possible que quelque chose soit plus fort que la volonté de vivre à tout prix ? J'admets ne pas avoir étudié la question de ce point de vue, mais votre volonté m'impressionne. Je devrais peut-être faire preuve de courage moi aussi et voir mon hypothèse sous un angle différent. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn frowns, pensively tugging at a piston on his beard.{/n} "You differentiate between the concepts of 'life' and 'survival'? But where do you draw the line? Can anything outweigh the desire to live at all costs? I admit, I have not considered the question from such a perspective, but your strength of will impresses me. Perhaps I should show some fortitude as well, and consider my hypothesis from a different angle."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn fronce les sourcils et triture pensivement l'un des pistons de sa barbe.{/n} « Vous considérez donc que les concepts de vie et de survie sont différents ? Mais où est la limite ? Est-il possible que quelque chose soit plus fort que la volonté de vivre à tout prix ? J'admets ne pas avoir étudié la question de ce point de vue, mais votre volonté m'impressionne. Je devrais peut-être faire preuve de courage moi aussi et voir mon hypothèse sous un angle différent. »

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡微微皱眉，若有所思地拨弄着胡须上的一枚活塞。{/n}“您在区分‘生命’与‘存在’这两个概念？那么界限何在？是否存在某种价值，可以凌驾于‘不惜一切代价活下去’的欲望之上？我承认，我从未从这一角度思考过，但您的意志力让我钦佩。或许，我也该展现出一些坚韧，从不同角度审视我的假设。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn frowns, pensively tugging at a piston on his beard.{/n} "You differentiate between the concepts of 'life' and 'survival'? But where do you draw the line? Can anything outweigh the desire to live at all costs? I admit, I have not considered the question from such a perspective, but your strength of will impresses me. Perhaps I should show some fortitude as well, and consider my hypothesis from a different angle."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡微微皱眉，若有所思地拨弄着胡须上的一枚活塞。{/n}“您在区分‘生命’与‘存在’这两个概念？那么界限何在？是否存在某种价值，可以凌驾于‘不惜一切代价活下去’的欲望之上？我承认，我从未从这一角度思考过，但您的意志力让我钦佩。或许，我也该展现出一些坚韧，从不同角度审视我的假设。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn frunce el ceño, mesándose un pistón de la barba.{/n} «¿Diferencia usted los conceptos de "vida" y "supervivencia"? Pero ¿dónde radica la diferencia? ¿Hay algo mayor que el deseo de vivir a cualquier precio? Admito que nunca me había planteado esta perspectiva, pero su fuerza de voluntad me impresiona. Tal vez deba mostrar un poco de fortaleza yo también y considerar mi hipótesis desde otro ángulo».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn frowns, pensively tugging at a piston on his beard.{/n} "You differentiate between the concepts of 'life' and 'survival'? But where do you draw the line? Can anything outweigh the desire to live at all costs? I admit, I have not considered the question from such a perspective, but your strength of will impresses me. Perhaps I should show some fortitude as well, and consider my hypothesis from a different angle."

Tal vez deba mostrar un poco de fortaleza yo también y considerar mi hipótesis desde otro ángulo».

languages.text: {n}悲しみ、驚き、そして臆病な希望が入り混じった、奇妙な感情の波がエオガンヌの顔に走った。{/n}「絶望に身をゆだねることなく、多くの喪失の苦味を味わうことができる、真に強い精神の持ち主の言葉だ。私も精神的に強くなって、仮説を別の角度から見るべきかもしれない」。
languages.original_text: {n}A bizarre wave of emotion ran across Eoghanne's face: a mixture of grief, surprise, and timid hope.{/n} "The words of one who is truly strong in spirit and can taste the bitterness of many losses without surrendering to despair. Perhaps I should be strong in spirit, too, and look at the hypothesis from a different angle."

languages.text: {n}Kaşlarını çatan Eogunn, sakalındaki bir pistonu düşünceli bir şekilde çekiştiriyor.{/n} "'Yaşam' ve 'hayatta kalma' kavramları arasında ayrım mı yapıyorsunuz? Peki çizgiyi nereden çekiyorsunuz? Ne pahasına olursa olsun yaşama arzusu, her şeyden daha ağır basabilir mi? Kabul etmeliyim ki soruyu böyle bir perspektiften değerlendirmemiştim fakat irade gücünüz beni etkiliyor. Belki ben de biraz metanet göstermeli ve hipotezimi farklı bir açıdan değerlendirmeliyim."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn frowns, pensively tugging at a piston on his beard.{/n} "You differentiate between the concepts of 'life' and 'survival'? But where do you draw the line? Can anything outweigh the desire to live at all costs? I admit, I have not considered the question from such a perspective, but your strength of will impresses me. Perhaps I should show some fortitude as well, and consider my hypothesis from a different angle."
